internal/app/httpwire.reason: Composition entrypoint retained until route modules move behind management modules.
internal/app/httpwire.target_action: Merge into routemodule after the route registration surface is stable.

internal/app/httpwire/configmodule.reason: Composition module retained until config handler construction moves behind management module registration.
internal/app/httpwire/configmodule.target_action: Fold into routemodule or management config registration.

internal/app/platform.reason: Composition state holder remains separate while platform bootstrap still owns multiple long-lived services.
internal/app/platform.target_action: Split platform state and lifecycle helpers when bootstrap flattening resumes.

internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/shell/back.reason: Small retry policy is isolated adapter shell behavior.
internal/bot/adapter/onebot11/shell/back.target_action: Review only if another adapter starts sharing the same retry policy.

internal/command.reason: Command parser is a shared domain utility with stable callers.
internal/command.target_action: Review if command parsing grows plugin-specific behavior.

internal/console.reason: Console stream is a shared runtime service boundary.
internal/console.target_action: Review when console persistence or filtering is added.

internal/health.reason: Health model is the shared server readiness surface.

internal/httpapi.reason: HTTP envelope and request context are shared management utilities.
internal/httpapi.target_action: Review when management handler generation is evaluated.

internal/logpath.reason: Log path display is shared by startup, CLI, runtime, and template logs.
internal/logpath.target_action: Review if path display moves into the logging package.

internal/management/authhttp.reason: Auth middleware is the management HTTP boundary.
internal/management/authhttp.target_action: Review if auth middleware becomes generated or shared outside management HTTP.

internal/management/ui.reason: Management UI static handler is a web surface boundary.
internal/management/ui.target_action: Review if web asset serving moves outside server.

internal/plugins/actions/httpaction.reason: HTTP action execution has host-scope and response handling separate from default action registration.
internal/plugins/actions/httpaction.target_action: Review with plugin local action module consolidation.

internal/plugins/capabilityview.reason: Capability projection remains separate until plugin read models are consolidated.

internal/plugins/runtime/registry.reason: Runtime registry is a shared runtime boundary.
internal/plugins/runtime/registry.target_action: Review if registry gains lifecycle or persistence responsibilities.

internal/protocol/onebot.reason: OneBot protocol constants are adapter contract helpers.
internal/protocol/onebot.target_action: Review when additional protocol constants appear.

internal/render/engine.reason: Render worker remains isolated while render package split is still active.
internal/render/engine.target_action: Split worker lifecycle and runner error handling if render concurrency grows.

internal/runtimepaths.reason: Runtime path helper is a shared platform utility.
internal/runtimepaths.target_action: Review if platform-specific path logic expands.

internal/schema.reason: Schema validator is a shared contract utility.
internal/schema.target_action: Review if contract validation moves to generated code.

internal/system/model.reason: System model separates status and diagnostics DTOs from service orchestration.
internal/system/model.target_action: Review with health and status model consolidation.

internal/testapp.reason: Test app harness is shared by integration tests.
internal/testapp.target_action: Review if integration tests move to package-local harnesses.

internal/textsafe.reason: Text safety helper remains separate until redaction utilities are consolidated.
internal/textsafe.target_action: Merge into redaction or logging safety utilities.
